positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed, geometric illustration featuring a stylized mountain range emerging from a crescent moon, set against a cosmic nebula background. The color palette should utilize deep sapphire blues, iridescent violets, burnt oranges, and glowing electric cyan. The overall style must be a blend of Art Deco symmetry and modern cosmic abstractism, designed with clean lines, strong silhouette contrast, and maximum print readability for apparel printing. Highly centralized composition, minimalist negative space.
